---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Add a clear and concise description of what the problem is. -->

**Example:** "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe alternatives you've considered. -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Describe specific use cases where this feature would be helpful. -->

1. **Use Case 1**: [Description]
2. **Use Case 2**: [Description]
3. **Use Case 3**: [Description]

## Implementation Ideas
<!-- If you have ideas about how this feature could be implemented, share them here. -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here. -->

## References
<!-- Link to any related issues, discussions, or external resources. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have provided relevant use cases
- [ ] I understand this is a suggestion and may not be implemented immediately
